Left null again rather than assigning a possibly-meaningless LAN address -- same reasoning as before, and this looks like a fixed planner artifact rather than something specific to either challenge.

topology._traffic_note: Same situation as Challenge200: used the resolved traffic_summary.flows entry (docker-2 -> server-4, continuous/10s/0% jitter) rather than the Traffic <section>'s burst/128kbps/2s/35%-jitter generation intent. predicted_allow_rules (pc-3->server-4, server-4->docker-1, and a duplicate of the real docker-2->server-4 flow) are preview-only synthetic allow-rule suggestions, not additional real flows -- not added to this list.

flags._note: Same situation as Challenge200: XML's FlagSequencing says flags_enabled=false/flag_assignments=[], but Challenge5_solution.json gives a concrete resolved chain and flag values, treated as authoritative here.
